payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial rectangular picture frame of dark brown wood with a gold-gilt inner edge and decorative molding; top, right and bottom edges are visible while the left side is cut off, showing a glossy finish with minor scuffs and glass glare over a sailboat print — approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
